description_long: This ornate ceiling-mounted sconce features a central column from which six elegantly curved arms radiate outward, each supporting a lampshade. The shades are classic, pleated, and likely made of fabric, giving the fixture a soft, diffused light. The arms are adorned with decorative spherical and teardrop-shaped elements, possibly glass or crystal, adding a touch of luxury and sparkle. The fixture is suspended from a chain and a round ceiling plate, both with a metallic finish. The overall design is symmetrical and balanced, with each arm and shade evenly spaced around the central axis. The sconce exudes a vintage or traditional aesthetic, suitable for upscale urban interiors or historic public spaces.
description: A luxurious, ceiling-mounted sconce with six pleated fabric shades, ornate curved arms, and decorative glass or crystal accents, suspended by a chain and round ceiling plate.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six lampshades and the symmetrical arrangement of the ornate arms and decorative elements.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the arms and the layered arrangement of the shades, with some arms partially obscured.
description_view_2: Similar to the front view, displaying the full symmetry and decorative details of the sconce.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, again showing the depth and curvature of the arms and the distribution of the shades.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, traditional design with ornate curved arms, pleated fabric shades, and decorative glass or crystal accents, evoking a sense of classic elegance.
